column1: Rows = cost items per unit. Columns = weekly production volume. All costs in USD. Revenue uses blended ASP of $27.50 (70% clip 3-packs at $24.99 / 30% desk_clamp rails at $34.99).
Material weights: clip 2.0g PLA+ / rail 80g PLA+. Blended avg ~22g/unit at 70/30 clip-rail mix. PLA+ bulk pricing by tier.
Labor rate: $15.00/hr (owner opportunity cost at 20–50/wk; contractor rate at 100+/wk). Machine: Bambu P1S $699 / 5000-hr life = $0.14/hr. Scrap: 10% first 2 weeks → 5% mature.
Basis: blended 22g avg × bulk price tier ($19/kg→$14/kg→$12/kg→$11/kg→$10/kg; note: $12/kg = confirmed Amazon bulk 10kg eSUN/SUNLU May 2026)
Filament scrap allowance (% of material cost; 5% mature)
Packaging materials per unit (poly mailer/box + void fill)
Basis: 70% poly mailers $0.10ea bulk + 30% small corrugated $0.45ea + void fill. Blended: ~$0.18–0.22/unit
Basis: $699 / 5000 hr life = $0.14/hr. Clip 50min plate÷12 = 4.2 min/unit × $0.14 = $0.0098. Rail 180min × $0.14 = $0.42/unit. Blended at 70/30 mix ≈ $0.13/unit. Amortized at utilization.
Basis: 90W × print hr × $0.12/kWh. Clip: 0.083hr × 90W × $0.12 = $0.0009. Rail: 3hr × 90W × $0.12 = $0.032. Blended 70/30 ≈ $0.01/unit. Negligible.
Print harvest + plate restart (owner; 45 sec/cycle amortized per unit)
Visual QC at harvest (owner; 8 sec clip / 45 sec rail; blended ~17 sec/unit)
Packaging + labeling per unit (owner or contractor; ~110 sec/unit)
Shipping batch upload (owner; 10 min/day ÷ daily units)
Contractor overhead (packaging delegation at 100+/wk; $600/mo ÷ weekly units)
Basis: $600/mo contractor (10 hr/wk × $15/hr) onboarded at 100/wk; scales as contractor hrs grow with volume
Owner time recaptured by contractor (benefit; not a cost line — noted for clarity)
Etsy transaction + payment fees (9.5% of revenue)
Basis: $27.50 blended ASP × 9.5% (6.5% transaction + 3.0% payment processing). Fixed as % of price.
Etsy listing fees (amortized $0.20/listing ÷ avg units per listing life)
Shipping cost per order (USPS Ground Advantage via Pirate Ship/ShipStation)
Basis: $4.50 blended avg (8% USPS surcharge in effect Apr 2026–Jan 2027). Rail orders avg $5.50; clip bundles avg $4.00. Customer pays; built into listed price.
ShipStation subscription amortized per unit (Growth $29.99/mo at 100+/wk)
Note: Pirate Ship is $0/mo but requires manual Etsy order handling due to Oct 2024 API changes. ShipStation recommended at 75+ orders/week.
Total platform + selling cost per unit
Basis: Home/garage = $0 through Month 5. Dedicated workspace at 100+/wk: $400–800/mo for workshop rental. Model uses $500/mo ÷ weekly units.
Software and tools (Farm Manager free; Printago; production log tools; $20–40/mo)
Total facility and overhead per unit
